# Principal Doctrines

*[Epicurus](../philosophers/epicurus.md) · 300 BCE*

A collection of forty maxims condensing the cardinal theses of Epicureanism, memorized by the disciples of the Garden. It contains in particular the fourfold remedy against the fear of the gods, death, pain, and the impossibility of happiness.
